14 ORGSMTID ORIG_ASMT_INT_ID Encrypted Original Assessment Internal ID CHAR 15 Original version (ASMT INT ID) of this assessment where Correction Number is 00.
15 PRVNTRNO PRVDR_INT_NUM Provider Internal Number CHAR 10 This field is used as a key to uniquely identify a provider in the CSP_PRVDR table.
16 REC_TYPE REC_TYPE Record Type CHAR 2 This is a calculated field based on the combination of the AA8A PRI RFA and AA8B SPC RFA fields.
17 RSCHGTS RES_CHG_TIMESTAMP Resident Data
